summary: Iter 10 boss feedback pass validation. 13 of 14 acceptance checks PASS. One real failure: BravaProof SectionTag title still reads 'Proof' but spec requires 'Lasting Beauty'. Nav dot aria-label is already 'Lasting Beauty' — only the in-section SectionTag title text was missed.

ui_bugs.issue: SectionTag title="Proof" — spec requires title="Lasting Beauty". Side-nav dot label already updated but the eyebrow section tag inside the section was missed.

Headline 'A new approach to contracting.' renders; 0

elements inside section (paragraph deleted); video present; audio verified — HTTP GET on /assets/videos/brand/new-approach-to-contracting/new-approach-to-contracting-with-music.mp4 returns 200 content-length 5,025,432 bytes (> 3,000,000)

verified_pass.roof_system_panels: system-detail-panels wraps panel-lowe + panel-iws. panel-lowe-toggle click flips aria-expanded false->true; open content contains 'radiant heat' AND 'EchoShield'. panel-iws open content contains 'Generic IWS' + 'Grace Ice' + 'Adhesive softens' + 'Rubberized asphalt' in 2-col grid
verified_pass.side_nav: 13 nav dots (nav-dot-*) rendered in order: hero, relationship, roof-eol, field-inspection, repair-vs-replace, todays-cedar, brava-proof, light-study, system, attention, new-approach, roadmap, human-close

action_items: BravaProof.jsx line 51: change title="Proof" -> title="Lasting Beauty" to match boss's 'Proof' -> 'Lasting Beauty' rename spec. Only the SectionTag inside the section was missed; nav dot was correctly updated.
critical_code_review_comments: Relationship.jsx SectionTag number shows '02 / 13' while RoofEndOfLife uses '03 / 12' and the other sections use '/ 12' denominators — numerator/denominator inconsistency ('13' vs '12') in the section counter eyebrow.
BravaProof.jsx uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML for quote text via “/” entities only — safe here but fine.

Hero.jsx HeroCell with hidden={true} still passes the element through JSX before returning null — fine, but dead prop pattern; could just remove the <HeroCell label='Client' .../> line entirely instead of passing hidden.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter-10 boss-notes items have been implemented EXCEPT one: BravaProof SectionTag title is still 'Proof' and must become 'Lasting Beauty'. Single-line fix at /app/frontend/src/components/sections/BravaProof.jsx line 51. After that, re-run the brava section assertion ('Lasting Beauty' appears inside [data-testid=section-brava-proof] eyebrow/title text). Everything else verified good.
